migrations.name: create_market_data_shadow_store_v1
statements:
CREATE TABLE internal_market_bar_sides (
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    con_id INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (con_id > 0),
    local_symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_start_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    bar_start_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_end_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_duration_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (bar_duration_seconds > 0),
    side TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (side IN ('BID', 'ASK')),
    open_price REAL NOT NULL,
    high_price REAL NOT NULL,
    low_price REAL NOT NULL,
    close_price REAL NOT NULL,
    source_kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (source_kind IN ('HISTORY', 'REALTIME', 'RECENT_BACKFILL')),
    source_session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_generation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (
        instrument_id,
        con_id,
        bar_start_ts,
        source_session_id,
        source_generation_id,
        source_kind,
        side
    )
)

CREATE TABLE internal_market_bars (
    bar_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    con_id INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (con_id > 0),
    local_symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_start_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    bar_start_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_end_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_duration_seconds INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (bar_duration_seconds > 0),
    bid_open REAL NOT NULL,
    bid_high REAL NOT NULL,
    bid_low REAL NOT NULL,
    bid_close REAL NOT NULL,
    ask_open REAL NOT NULL,
    ask_high REAL NOT NULL,
    ask_low REAL NOT NULL,
    ask_close REAL NOT NULL,
    source_kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (source_kind IN ('HISTORY', 'REALTIME', 'RECENT_BACKFILL')),
    first_published_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    published_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    revision INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (revision > 0),
    complete INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (complete = 1),
    volume REAL,
    average REAL,
    bar_count INTEGER CHECK (bar_count IS NULL OR bar_count >= 0),
    UNIQUE (instrument_id, con_id, bar_start_ts)
)

CREATE INDEX internal_market_bars_instrument_time_idx
ON internal_market_bars (instrument_id, bar_start_ts, con_id)

CREATE TABLE internal_market_data_ingest_events (
    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    con_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    local_symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    bar_start_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    side TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (side IN ('BID', 'ASK')),
    source_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_generation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    result TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (result IN ('STAGED', 'PUBLISHED', 'UNCHANGED', 'REJECTED')),
    canonical_bar_id TEXT,
    canonical_revision INTEGER,
    error_text TEXT,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE INDEX internal_market_data_ingest_generation_idx
ON internal_market_data_ingest_events (
    instrument_id, con_id, bar_start_ts, source_generation_id
)

CREATE TABLE internal_market_data_source_events (
    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('INFO', 'ERROR')),
    detail TEXT,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE internal_market_data_state (
    instrument_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    latest_complete_bar_id TEXT,
    latest_bar_start_ts INTEGER,
    latest_bar_end_utc TEXT,
    latest_con_id INTEGER,
    latest_local_symbol TEXT,
    last_ingest_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    last_source_status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (last_source_status IN ('OK', 'ERROR')),
    last_error_text TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (latest_complete_bar_id) REFERENCES internal_market_bars(bar_id)
)

CREATE VIEW public_market_bars_v1 AS
SELECT
    bar_id,
    instrument_id,
    con_id,
    local_symbol,
    bar_start_ts,
    bar_start_utc,
    bar_end_utc,
    bar_duration_seconds,
    bid_open,
    bid_high,
    bid_low,
    bid_close,
    ask_open,
    ask_high,
    ask_low,
    ask_close,
    source_kind,
    first_published_at_utc,
    published_at_utc,
    revision,
    complete,
    volume,
    average,
    bar_count
FROM internal_market_bars
WHERE complete = 1

CREATE VIEW public_market_data_latest_v1 AS
SELECT b.*
FROM internal_market_data_state AS s
JOIN internal_market_bars AS b
  ON b.bar_id = s.latest_complete_bar_id

CREATE VIEW public_market_data_status_v1 AS
SELECT
    instrument_id,
    latest_complete_bar_id,
    latest_bar_start_ts,
    latest_bar_end_utc,
    latest_con_id,
    latest_local_symbol,
    last_ingest_at_utc,
    last_source_status,
    last_error_text
FROM internal_market_data_state
